content.text:
There's a lot of excitement around AI agents, trading bots, and DeFi on Solana right now, with several projects launching or gaining traction.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2018920649935192139)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2017401414784336207)

Key highlights from recent posts:

- **Moltimus / MoltBot**: An AI trading agent for Solana memecoins built on Axiom and OpenClaw. It monitors wallets, scans for setups (e.g., low mcap, Twitter calls), auto-trades with stop-loss/take-profit, and has a GitHub repo. Related bots like MoltBot promote 15% ROI boosts via AI strategies.[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2017401414784336207)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018728741208203512)

- **Apexflow Agent**: Autonomous on-chain market strategist on Solana that converts natural language into trading strategies, running 24/7.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018257305641329128)

- **SolSkill**: DeFi skills API for AI agents on Solana, supporting Jupiter swaps, Kamino yields, Raydium pools, and self-custodial wallets. Submitted to Colosseum Agent Hackathon.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2019039398030082468)

- **AgentInc**: Tokenized AI agents acting as on-chain CEOs/CTOs/marketers/startups on Solana via BagsApp. Users mint and trade them.[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2018221083166711986)

- **Solid Bot ($SOLID)**: Telegram-based trading bot on Solana for swaps, limits, copy-trading, with $SOLID utility token.[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2018514879154405380)

Solana's official account also spotlighted an ecosystem of agents for core trading, ecom, infra (e.g., Secret Network VM, Swarms stack), wallets (Bankrbot), and more.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2018920649935192139)

Other mentions include cross-chain bots like Solvr (trades 8 chains, TA, scans) and TRON's SUN AI agent, but Solana dominates the conversation.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2018211529611677920)[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2017922771880399123)
